description: Composition Red round neck Team India Training jersey, made of 100% Dri-Fit polyester, has a round neck with fabric tape on inseam of the collar, Team India crest on left chest, and mesh panels on the sides and back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Do not use softeners or bleach Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not line dry Do not dry clean Do not iron Here is your chance to bleed blue for the men in Blue. Wear this Team India jersey from nike, made with special care and efficient fabric management technologies like Dri-fit polyester, and achieve optimum performance when you take to the field.
